program.title: Bachelor of Science in Human Ecology
program.description: The program aims to produce professionals who can contribute to the improvement of human welfare. Specifically, the student is trained to understand human development in relation to the biophysical and social environments; to have the necessary skills and competencies to participate in development programs as well as teaching and research on human-environment interaction; and to internalize and apply the ecological perspective to societyâ€™s problems.
